title: Moving Average
description: The function block takes the value from the input every 'C' seconds and places it in a buffer that has a maximum of 'N' entries. The oldest entry from this buffer is always removed. The average value is calculated from these entries.

inputs.description: Analogue input from which the moving average is calculated.
Deactivates the averaging function. Output (Avg) is equal to the value at input (V).

parameters.description: Remanence input: If active, the function block retains its previous state after a Miniserver reboot. The state of the function block is saved: – When saving to the Miniserver – At a planned reboot – Before a backup – Once per hour The data is saved on the SD card.
Used to set the interval at which the value on the input read to then be averaged.
Number of values used for calculating average.
